Usage: cardano-submit-api 
  --config FILEPATH
    [--cardano-mode [--epoch-slots SLOTS]]
    (--mainnet | --testnet-magic NATURAL)
    --socket-path FILEPATH
    [--listen-address HOST]
    [--port INT]
    [--metrics-port PORT]

  Cardano transaction submission web API.

Available options:
  --config FILEPATH        Path to the tx-submit web API configuration file
  --cardano-mode           For talking to a node running in full Cardano mode
                           (default).
  --epoch-slots SLOTS      The number of slots per epoch for the Byron era.
                           (default: 21600)
  --mainnet                Use the mainnet magic id. This overrides the
                           CARDANO_NODE_NETWORK_ID environment variable
  --testnet-magic NATURAL  Specify a testnet magic id. This overrides the
                           CARDANO_NODE_NETWORK_ID environment variable
  --socket-path FILEPATH   Path to a cardano-node socket
  --listen-address HOST    Specification of which host to the bind API server
                           to. Can be an IPv[46] address, hostname, or '*'.
                           (default: "127.0.0.1")
  --port INT               Port used for the API server. (default: 8090)
  --metrics-port PORT      Port for exposing metrics. If unavailable, the next
                           free port is used. If no port can be allocated, the
                           transaction submission API starts without metrics
                           endpoint. (default: 8081)
  --version                Show the cardano-submit-api version
  -h,--help                Show this help text
